examples.text: يَتَمَيَّزُ مُنَاخُ ٱلْمَدِينَةِ بِٱلْجَفَافِ وَٱلصَّيْفِ ٱلْحَارِّ.
examples.english: The city's climate is characterized by dryness and hot summers.

etymology.text:
Etymology tree
Copticder.?
Byzantine Greek ἀλμενιχιακά (almenikhiaká)bor.?
Arabic مناخ
Possibly borrowed from Byzantine Greek ἀλμενιχιακά (almenikhiaká, “astronomical indexes”), possibly from Coptic.
